headline: Netskope CEO Sanjay Beri appears on CNBC 'Fortt Knox' to discuss fiscal Q1 2027 earnings
whyItMatters: First post-print CEO commentary after the June 3 Q1 FY27 report; signals management is actively defending the story into the post-earnings stock weakness.

headline: Netskope Reports Q1 FY2027: ARR $845M (+29% YoY), Revenue $202M (+28% YoY)
whyItMatters: ARR growth deceleration from 34% to 29% YoY is the key investor debate — is this normal maturation toward a $1B ARR steady state, or the start of a more pronounced deceleration against a more competitive landscape?

headline: Netskope First Post-IPO Earnings: FY2026 Guidance of $701-703M Beats Street Estimates
whyItMatters: Beating analyst consensus of ~$690M on inaugural public guidance signals execution credibility; the guidance raise reflects AI-driven enterprise security budget expansion.

headline: Netskope Climbs 21% After $908M IPO on NASDAQ (NTSK); Lightspeed Books $1B+ Return
whyItMatters: The largest cybersecurity IPO of 2025 validated institutional demand for SASE/SSE infrastructure plays; the post-IPO selloff to $12 from $22.49 first-day close sets up the current valuation debate.

headline: Netskope IPO In Demand as AI Era Heightens Cyber Threats; Deal ~20x Oversubscribed
whyItMatters: AI adoption expanding enterprise attack surfaces is the core secular demand driver; the 20x oversubscription reflects the structural thesis rather than company-specific factors.

headline: Netskope Files for $813M IPO; H1 FY2026 Revenue Grew 31% to $328.5M
whyItMatters: S-1 filing disclosed first public look at financials: 31% revenue growth, narrowing net loss, 118% NRR, and 4,317 customers — metrics that positioned NTSK as a high-quality compounder at IPO.
